title: Courtship
content:
Augustus Fitzgibbons Moran
         Fell in love with Maria McCann.
            With a yell and a whoop
            He cleared the front stoop
         Just ahead of her papa's brogan.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Courtship"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
